name: Matchday Two Heroics at World Cup 2026
angle: A standout second round of group games: debutants Curacao held Ecuador 0-0 behind a 15-save goalkeeping display from Eloy Room, Germany came from behind through a Deniz Undav brace, and the Netherlands tore Sweden apart 5-1.

questions.question: World Cup debutants Curacao earned their first ever point with a goalless draw. Which side did they hold?
Curacao goalkeeper Eloy Room kept Ecuador out almost single-handedly. How many saves did he make in the 0-0 draw, one short of the World Cup single-match record?
Room finished a save short of the World Cup single-game record of 16, set in the 2014 round of 16 against Belgium. Which goalkeeper holds that record?
Curacao's appearance makes them the smallest nation by population ever to play at a men's World Cup. Which 2018 debutant had previously held that distinction?
From which confederation did Curacao, a Caribbean island side, qualify for the World Cup?
Germany came from behind to win 2-1 in Toronto. Which side did they beat?
Germany's comeback was driven by a substitute who scored twice after coming on around the hour mark. Who was it?
Which Ivory Coast captain gave his side a shock first-half lead against Germany before Undav's late double turned the game?
The biggest win of the day was a 5-1 rout by the Netherlands. Which Scandinavian side did they put to the sword?
Two Dutch forwards scored braces in the win over Sweden: Cody Gakpo and which striker, who struck twice in the first half?
Brazil eased past Haiti 3-0 on the same day. Which forward scored twice for the Selecao?
Germany's victory booked their place in which stage of the expanded 48-team tournament?
Scotland were stunned by Morocco, losing 1-0 to an Ismael Saibari strike. How early did the goal come?
Curacao's gritty point against Ecuador came after a chastening tournament opener. What was the score in that first match against Germany?
The 2026 World Cup is being co-hosted by the United States, Canada and which other nation?

sources: https://sports.yahoo.com/soccer/article/2026-world-cup-eloy-rooms-15-save-masterclass-helps-curacao-stun-ecuador-in-0-0-draw-020003395.html (Eloy Room 15 saves; Curacao smallest nation ever; first WC point; Tim Howard's 16-save record in 2014 R16 v Belgium; Curacao opened with a 7-1 loss to Germany)

https://www.outlookindia.com/sports/football/germany-vs-ivory-coast-live-score-fifa-world-cup-2026-group-e-ger-civ-updates-toronto-stadium-highlights (Kessie opener 30'; Undav introduced ~60', brace 68' and 94'; Germany into Round of 32)

https://www.outlookindia.com/sports/football/netherlands-vs-sweden-live-score-fifa-world-cup-2026-group-f-ned-v-swe-updates-houston-stadium-highlights (Brobbey first-half brace; Gakpo second-half brace; Summerville; Elanga consolation)
https://www.skysports.com/football/brazil-vs-haiti/549794 (Brazil 3-0 Haiti; Matheus Cunha 23' and 36'; Vinicius Jr 45+3')
